name: Cottage Cheese Protein Pancakes
method: In a large bowl whisk together the cottage cheese, eggs, milk, vanilla extract, maple syrup and melted butter until smooth
In a separate bowl mix the flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt and the whey protein
Gently fold the dry ingredients into the wet mix. A few lumps are fine
Carefully fold in the blueberries
Let the batter rest for 5 to 10 minutes
Heat a pan over medium-low heat with a little butter
Pour roughly a quarter of the mix per pancake
Cook until bubbles form and the edges set, then flip and cook for another 1 to 2 minutes
Stack them up, add butter, drizzle maple syrup and enjoy

name: Cheesy Crispy Smashed Potato Bites
method: Boil the potatoes for 15 to 20 minutes until soft
Line a baking tray with baking paper
Add small piles of cottage cheese, mozzarella and parmesan to the tray
Place the squashed potatoes on top, or squash them down with a glass
Spray with olive oil
Season with garlic powder, oregano, chilli flakes, salt and pepper
Bake at 200°C for 25 to 30 minutes until golden and crispy
Mix all sauce ingredients together in a bowl
Serve with the crispy potato bites

name: One Tray Red Thai Chicken Rice Bake
method: Add the rice, chicken, broccoli, peppers and green beans to a large baking dish
Add the curry paste, ginger, garlic and seasonings
Pour over the coconut milk and enough water to cover the rice
Mix well
Cover tightly with foil
Bake at 190°C for 45 minutes
Remove the foil and bake for a further 5 minutes
Garnish with coriander and chilli if using
Serve

name: Slow Cooker Creamy Chicken Orzo
method: Add the chicken, bolognese sauce, tomato purée, garlic purée, stock, herbs, salt and pepper to your slow cooker
Mix well
Cook on high for 3 to 4 hours, or low for 6 to 7
Shred the chicken
Add the orzo, cream cheese, mozzarella and frozen mixed veg
Mix again
Put the lid back on and cook on high for another 20 to 30 minutes, stirring once or twice, until the orzo is soft and everything is creamy
Serve

name: Garlic Parmesan Chicken Tenders
method: Crush the cornflakes into crumbs — not dust, you still want a bit of crunch
Season the chicken with salt, pepper, paprika and coriander if using
Dip the chicken into the egg, then coat in the crushed cornflakes
Air fry at 180°C for around 10 minutes until cooked through and crispy
Mix the melted butter, garlic purée and parmesan together
Toss the cooked chicken in the garlic parmesan butter
Serve

name: Salmon & Avocado Bowl
method: Flake the salmon into a bowl
Add the avocado, yoghurt, lemon juice and cucumber
Season with salt and pepper
Mix well
Add hot sauce or dill if you're feeling fancy

name: High Protein Carrot Cake
method: Preheat oven to 180°C
Add the oats, protein powder, cinnamon, nutmeg, baking powder and bicarbonate of soda to a bowl
Mix in the grated carrots, egg whites, almond milk, Greek yoghurt and flavouring
Mix until combined
Pour into a lined baking dish or cake tin
Bake for 25 to 30 minutes until cooked through
Mix together the frosting ingredients and spread over once cooled
Optional: sprinkle a little sweetener over the top before serving

name: Slow Cooker Chicken Tikka Masala
method: Throw everything into the slow cooker except the cream and rice
Mix well
Cook on low for 6 to 7 hours or high for 3 to 4 hours
Stir through the double cream just before serving
Serve with rice

name: High Protein Cheesecake Overnight Weetabix
method: Crush the Weetabix into a bowl or jar
Add a splash of milk and press it down
Mix the yoghurt and protein powder together until smooth
Spread over the Weetabix base
Sprinkle over the chia seeds
Add the jam on top
Leave in the fridge overnight

name: Creamy Garlic Chicken Wraps
method: Chop chicken breast into chunks
Season with paprika, garlic powder, onion powder, oregano, salt and pepper
Mix well
Fry chicken in a pan for around 6 to 8 minutes until cooked through
Add grated garlic and cook for 30 seconds
Add low fat cream cheese and stir while it melts
Add milk and mix until smooth
Add parmesan and spinach
Cook until the spinach wilts
Add mozzarella to the middle of your wraps
Add the creamy chicken filling
Wrap tightly
Spray with oil and sprinkle oregano on top
Air fry at 200°C for 6 to 8 minutes until golden and crispy

name: Tuna & Egg Salad
method: Boil your eggs for around 7 minutes
Peel and chop them up
Throw everything into a bowl
Mix well
Serve in sandwiches, wraps, potatoes or eat as is

name: Chicken Tacos
method: Slice chicken thighs into thin strips and season with 2/3 of the taco seasoning, garlic powder, salt and pepper
Fry the chicken until cooked through and slightly crispy
Dice the onion and pepper and fry in the same pan
Add the sweetcorn and black beans, then add the rest of the taco seasoning
Add the chicken back in and mix everything together
Spray one side of each mini tortilla with oil
Fill each tortilla with the taco mix, fold in half and stack upright in a baking dish
Sprinkle each taco with mozzarella
Bake at 180°C for 12 to 15 minutes until golden and crispy
Top with Greek yoghurt, salsa and coriander

name: Slow Cooker Honey Sriracha Chicken Noodles
ingredients: 1 tbsp cornflour mixed with 1 tbsp water
method: Throw everything except the noodles and spring onions into the slow cooker
Cook on high for 3 to 4 hours or low for 7 to 8 hours
Shred the chicken slightly and stir it all together
Cook your noodles separately and toss them in
Top with spring onions and serve

name: High Protein Taco Beef Pasta Bake
method: Preheat oven to 180°C
Chuck everything into a big baking dish
Add a small splash of water and mix it all together
Cover with foil
Bake for 45 minutes
Take foil off and bake for another 5 minutes
Let it sit for a few minutes before serving

name: Easy Protein Cinnamon Buns
method: Mix the flour, baking powder, baking soda, sweetener and salt
Add the yoghurt and egg yolk and mix until it forms a dough
Knead into a smooth ball
Roll it out flat
Spread the butter over it
Sprinkle cinnamon and brown stevia all over
Roll it up into a log and slice into buns
Grease your tray with butter and place the buns in
Bake at 180°C for 25 to 30 minutes
Mix the frosting ingredients with a splash of water until thick
Drizzle frosting all over once baked

name: Chicken & Rice Bake
ingredients: Turmeric, cumin, paprika, salt and pepper
Paprika, cumin, salt and pepper (for chicken)
method: Mix all the rice ingredients in a large oven dish
Chop chicken, mix with yoghurt, curry paste and spices
Place chicken on top of the rice with skewers
Cover and cook at 180°C for 45 minutes
Remove cover and cook for another 5 to 10 minutes
Mix salad ingredients and serve on the side

name: Bacon & Egg Tortilla Cups
method: Push your tortillas into a muffin tray to make little bowls
In a bowl mix the eggs, bacon, cheese, salt and pepper
Mix well
Pour the mix into your tortilla cups
Bake at 180°C for 18 to 20 minutes

name: Salmon Protein Quiche
method: Preheat oven to 180°C
Push the wrap into a cake tin or bowl to form a quiche shell
Add the smoked salmon and chopped dill
Crack in the eggs
Season with salt and pepper
Give it a gentle mix with a fork
Bake for about 15 minutes until set
Let cool slightly, then add sweet chilli jam on top if using

name: Lemon & Herb Chicken Pasta Tray Bake
method: Preheat the oven to 190°C
Dice the chicken, onion and peppers
Add the pasta, chicken, onion, peppers, seasoning packet, chopped tomatoes and lemon & herb sauce into a large ovenproof dish, season with salt and pepper and mix everything together
Top with the grated mozzarella
Cover with foil and bake for 50 minutes at 190°C

name: 600 Calorie Big Stack Burger
ingredients: Pinch of salt and black pepper (sauce)
method: Mix all the sauce ingredients together
Split the beef into two 80g patties, season with salt and pepper, and cook in a hot pan 2 to 3 minutes per side
Add the cheese slice so it melts
Toast the bun, spread the sauce, stack the patties, diced onions and crispy onions

name: Beef Shawarma Wraps
method: Cook the beef with all the spices along with the tomatoes and garlic cloves at 200°C for 40 minutes
Mix the tzatziki ingredients together (yogurt, grated cucumber, roasted garlic, herbs, lemon, oil)
Warm your flatbreads for a couple of minutes
Load up with tzatziki, beef and veg, wrap and serve

name: Oreo Mug Cake
method: Pop the Oreos in a mug
Add the milk and crush everything up
Add the flour, cocoa powder, sweetener and baking powder
Mix until smooth
Microwave for around 45 to 60 seconds
Let it cool slightly, then enjoy

name: Stuffed Crust Breakfast Pizza
method: Fold the tortilla into a triangle with the cheese sticks tucked into the edges and secure with toothpicks
Add your veggies, crack the egg into the middle, then sprinkle over the bacon
Air fry at 180°C for 12 to 15 minutes until crispy and the egg is cooked through
Remove toothpicks, slice it up and enjoy

name: Protein Chicken Pepperoni Pizza
method: Preheat oven to 200°C and line a baking tray with baking paper
Mix chicken mince, eggs, parmesan, garlic powder, Italian seasoning, salt and pepper until fully combined
Press onto the tray into a thin circle or rectangle
Bake for 25 minutes until golden and firm, then let it rest for 5 minutes
Turn oven up to 230°C, add pizza sauce, mozzarella and pepperoni
Bake for another 10 minutes until melted and bubbling, then grill for 1 to 2 minutes for extra crispiness
Let cool slightly, slice into 4 and enjoy

name: Chicken & Chorizo One Pan Rice
method: Mix everything in a dish
Pour over the stock
Cover and bake at 200°C for 50 minutes
Uncover and bake for a further 10 minutes

name: Tortilla Pizza
method: Mix the eggs, ham, mozzarella, pepperoni and pizza sauce together
Spread over the tortillas
Bake in the oven for 20 to 25 minutes
Grill for a further 5 minutes until golden

name: High Protein Yogurt Bowl Dessert
method: Slice the banana and caramelise in a pan with honey and cinnamon for a few minutes
Add your yogurt to a bowl
Top with the caramelised banana, walnuts and chocolate chips
Eat immediately

name: Sesame Chicken
method: Cut the chicken thighs into bite-sized pieces
Add to a bowl with the eggs, cornflour and salt and mix until well coated
Air fry or fry the chicken pieces until crispy and golden
In another pan add the ketchup, soy sauce, honey, brown sugar, rice vinegar, garlic and sesame oil
Bring to a gentle simmer
Mix the cornflour with a splash of water and stir into the sauce to thicken
Add the crispy chicken and toss until coated in the sauce
Finish with a pinch of sesame seeds

name: High Protein Wrap Quiche
method: Crack the eggs into a bowl
Add the cottage cheese
Season with salt, pepper and a generous shake of garlic granules
Mix well
Lay the wrap into a baking dish
Add spinach
Pour the egg mixture over
Sprinkle the feta on top
Bake at 180°C for 20 minutes until set and slightly golden

name: One Tray Peri Peri Chicken Pasta
method: Preheat oven to 190°C
Dice chicken and veg
Mix everything except the mozzarella in a large oven dish
Season and stir well
Top with mozzarella
Cover and bake for 45 minutes
Uncover for 5 minutes
Rest for 5 to 10 minutes
Serve

name: Buffalo Chicken Burrito
method: Slice chicken into chunks, coat with cornflour and Cajun seasoning
Air fry at 200°C for 12 minutes, or bake at 200°C for 20 to 25 minutes flipping halfway
While chicken cooks, finely slice the onion and cabbage, grate the carrot, then mix everything together for the slaw
Heat buffalo sauce ingredients in a pan, simmer for a couple of minutes, then toss in the cooked chicken until coated
Add chicken, cheese and coleslaw to your wrap, roll tightly and toast if you want a bit of crunch

name: Protein Blueberry Donut Holes
ingredients: 30-40g sugar free white chocolate chips, melted (for drizzle)
method: Mix the almond flour, baking powder and Greek yoghurt in a bowl, knead until smooth and firm — add more almond flour if sticky
Gently fold in the blueberries and roll into small golf ball-sized balls
Spray lightly with oil and air fry at 180°C for 8 to 10 minutes until golden
Drizzle the melted white chocolate on top and let it set

name: Healthy High Protein Breakfast Bagels
method: Cook your bacon until crispy
Crack 16 eggs into a large bowl
Add the blended cottage cheese, parmesan, salt and onion and garlic powder
Mix well
Pour enough of the egg mix into a frying pan to cover the bottom, add a lid and fry for about 2 minutes
Fold into a pocket and set aside
Toast your bagels
Spread sriracha on the bagel, add an egg pocket, then the bacon, top with a cheddar slice and close

name: Big Mac Fakeaway
method: Mix sauce ingredients together (ketchup, mayo, mustard, gherkin juice, sliced gherkins and diced onions)
Flatten two patties, season with salt and garlic powder and fry for 2 minutes each side, adding cheese on top while the second side cooks
Toast your buns for 1 to 2 minutes
Stack: bun, sauce, lettuce, patty — repeat — gherkins on top

name: Ninja Creami Chocolate Protein Ice Cream
method: Add all base ingredients to a blender and blitz until smooth
Pour into your Ninja Creami pint and freeze for at least 16 hours
Run the pint under hot water for about 60 seconds
Spin on Lite Ice Cream setting
If it's powdery, hit Re-spin
Make a hole down the middle with a butter knife and add the nuts and marshmallows
Run the Mix-In cycle
Eat straight from the tub

name: Vanilla Biscoff Protein Ice Cream
method: Mix milk, protein powder, custard powder and sweetener together
Freeze for 24 hours
Spin in the Ninja Creami, then re-spin with a splash of milk
Mix in crushed Biscoff biscuit and drizzle melted Biscoff spread on top

name: Protein Breakfast Boats
method: Preheat oven to 180°C
Mix everything except the taco boats and cheese
Fill the boats evenly
Top with cheese
Bake for 20 to 25 minutes

name: Cheesy Chicken Fajita Pasta Bake
method: Preheat oven to 190°C
Dice the chicken, onion and peppers
Add everything except the mozzarella into a large ovenproof dish
Rinse out the chopped tomato tin with 100ml water and pour it in, then mix everything well
Sprinkle the mozzarella evenly over the top
Cover with foil and bake for 45 minutes at 190°C, then uncover and bake for another 5 minutes
Rest for 5 to 10 minutes so the sauce thickens and the pasta soaks everything up
Serve
